name: Caribbean Adventure
description: Our flagship package. Seven nights on the southern Caribbean coast with guided reef snorkeling, a Bribri indigenous cultural day, kayaking through the Gandoca mangroves, and wildlife spotting in one of Central America's most biodiverse wildlife refuges.

name: Reef & Rainforest
description: Two countries, one unforgettable journey. Begin on Bocas del Toro's world-class reef in Panama, then cross into Costa Rica for jungle lodges, wildlife spotting, and the pristine beaches of the Talamanca coast.

name: Bribri Cultural Immersion
description: A rare opportunity to stay within Bribri indigenous territory in the Talamanca mountains. Community-led cacao ceremonies, traditional medicine walks, river bathing, and meals prepared by community members. All proceeds directly benefit the hosting community.

name: Caribbean Escape
description: The most intimate package we offer — six nights of pure Caribbean magic. Private villa accommodation, a chef dinner under the stars, sunset catamaran sail, and all the unhurried beauty of a coast that hasn't yet been overrun.
